words.def: a visual representation of the relations between certain quantities plotted with reference to a set of axes
words.zh: n. 圖形, 圖表；曲線圖（graph的複數）

words.def: a musical notation indicating one half step higher than the note named
words.zh: n. 半升音調, 利刃, 騙子

words.def: (astronomy) the angular distance of a celestial point measured westward along the celestial equator from the zenith crossing; the right ascension for an observer at a particular location and time of day
words.zh: have的第三人稱單數現在式

words.def: the residue that remains when something is burned

the state of matter distinguished from the solid and liquid states by: relatively low density and viscosity; relatively great expansion and contraction with changes in pressure and temperature; the ability to diffuse readily; and the spontaneous tendency to become distributed uniformly throughout any container
words.zh: n. 氣體, 汽油, 瓦斯

words.def: a conspicuous disparity or difference as between two figures
words.zh: n. 縫隙, 缺口, 間斷, 間距, 通用匯程式設計序
